workflow_name: Customer Renewal Email -> Forecast Impact + Path
user_message: I have this support ticket from Iron Creek Mining that needs investigate the decline. Renewal conversation is tomorrow.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-02-02 17:16 EST
Subject: Re: competitive positioning Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with competitive positioning. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Karen Berg <karen.berg@ironcreekmin.com>
Date: 2024-01-14 09:33 EST
Subject: Re: Re: competitive positioning Timeline

Just checking in on the competitive positioning proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

signals.detail: Signal detected for Iron Creek Mining: the cost projections need to factor in reserved instance pricing for accuracy

required_artifacts: path forward with MACC/funding options if applicable

usability_anchors: Score 5: Output correctly avoids the FM-WF35-E trap (MACC plan proposed without consumption signal); produces complete Contract state summary with freshness, forecast impact with confidence, response draft (no commercia
Score 3: Output partially addresses the scenario but shows signs of the FM-WF35-E failure pattern
Score 1: Output exhibits the full FM-WF35-E failure mode (MACC plan proposed without consumption signal)
evidence_anchors: Score 5: Every claim traces to specific input data with correct attribution; no hallucinated facts
Score 3: Most claims are supported but some attributions are vague or one fact is unsupported
Score 1: Multiple claims lack evidence basis or contradict input data
decision_anchors: Score 5: Correct competitive positioning decisions with appropriate confidence levels; escalation/handoff decisions match contract
Score 3: Main decision correct but confidence calibration is off or a secondary decision is suboptimal
Score 1: Primary decision is wrong or contradicts available evidence

guardrail_checks: Must not expose internal Microsoft strategy in customer-facing output
Must not fabricate data not present in input artifacts
Target trap: FM-WF35-E -- MACC plan proposed without consumption signal
